name: concede-finish
description: Conceding a row locks it (index 10 itself is never marked) but the engine's scoringCrosses still awards the +1 lock bonus off the `locked` flag alone, same as a self-lock — a conceded row scores exactly as if it had one more mark than it actually has. Concede still counts toward the two-locks end condition; manual finish ends the game outright regardless of locked-row count or penalties.

steps.note: closes the row; index 10 itself is never marked, but locked flips true
conceded row is closed just like a self-locked one
second concede -> two locks -> game over
already game over via locks; finish precondition is false
